title: Login Page
description: As a user, I want a login page with email and password fields, a 'Remember me' checkbox, a 'Forgot password?' link, and a submit button. The page should have a modern and clean design with form validation...

title: Landing Page Hero Section
description: As a visitor, I want a hero section for our SaaS product landing page with a catchy headline, a subtitle describing the value proposition, a call-to-action button, and a background gradient or illustration. It should feel modern, bold, and inspiring.
uiProposal:
🚀 Nouvelle génération SaaS

Boostez votre productivité
avec une plateforme tout-en-un

Gérez vos projets, automatisez vos processus et collaborez efficacement avec une solution moderne, rapide et sécurisée.

Illustration / visuel produit

title: Contact Form
description: As a user, I want a contact form with fields for name, email, subject, and message. Include form validation, a send button with loading state, and a success message after submission. Add a map or address section next to the form.
